layer.title: IMD Employment Score
layer.description: Employment deprivation score from the Indices of Multiple Deprivation, surfaced at WMCA ward geography for visual comparison.

source.publisher: Department for Levelling Up, Housing & Communities
source.licence: Open Government Licence v3.0 via Birmingham City Observatory metadata
source.caveat: IMD is a relative deprivation measure. Higher values indicate stronger employment deprivation and should not be read as a direct unemployment rate.
